summary: A clip from a Fox News interview. A blonde anchor in a pink jacket sits on the left; a man in a dark jacket is interviewed via video link on the right, labeled in the lower-third JOE ABRAHAM | ANGEL FATHER OF KATIE ABRAHAM. A photograph of a young woman by a city waterfront is shown beside him. The banner reads ANGEL FAMILIES PAY TRIBUTE TO THEIR LOVED-ONES.
